ai.description: Whether the function body was AI-generated.

returnType.description: TypeScript primitive return type string. Exactly one of returnType or returnTypeId must be present.

returnTypeId.description: UUID of a Kanecta type item for object-typed return values. Exactly one of returnType or returnTypeId must be present.

typeParameters.description: Generic type parameters (e.g. <T extends Foo = Bar>).

dependencies.description: npm packages required by this function (e.g. ["axios@^1.0.0"]).

deprecated.description: If set, marks the function as deprecated. Value is the deprecation message.

body.description: Inline function body. Postgres adapter only — filesystem/SQLite store the body in meta.files.body = "body.ts".

typeId.description: UUID of a Kanecta type item.

functionId.description: UUID of a Kanecta function item (for callback parameters).

rest.description: Whether this is a rest parameter (...).

defaultValue.description: Default value expression as a string.
